name: Family affairs
overview: True stories of people whose lives have spiraled out of control... Families are different, and life within them unfolds in different ways. Even with the best intentions, parents sometimes lose control of their children's upbringing, and disaster strikes. Other times, all it takes is for them to fall in with the wrong crowd, and suddenly the whole family's life becomes hell!

trailers.title: Rodinné prípady: Follow me - už teraz na VOYO a v pondelok 6. 12. 2021 o 17:55 na TV Markíza
